title: Update a status based on a mirrored status

posts.author: Maximus (Marc Hemsley)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello, I am trying to find a way where I can update a status column when a mirrored status column changes. Below is a screenshot, the contact type on the left in the mirrored field and when this changes to Ex Client I want to update the contact type column on the right to the same Ex Client. Is there a way to do this? Any help would be brilliant

image350×588 17.9 KB

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
hi @Maximus

One of our partners has an app that does copies a mirrored status to a real status. This takes the first item in the first connected boards, so if you have multi board / multi item mirrors this might be less useful. @Kimb is the man to ask for more info.

posts.author: Kimb (Kim Berney)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey @Maximus feel free to email me at kim@workperfect.io we have a great app that can help with this as described by @basdebruin

posts.author: Maximus (Marc Hemsley)
posts.cookedHtml: Brilliant thank you I have emailed you Kim

posts.author: highfive331 (Emily Travis)
posts.cookedHtml: What’s the app that you ended up using, and was it successful in solving your problem?
